steps.notes: Queried the AI Brief Story Pool Notion database (data_source: b56f7118-384a-82c2-82da-072d4aace5ed) filtered by Status=Candidate. Pulled 22 Candidate stories tagged W22 and W23 across all 7 clients (Incserv, M&T Bank, Brown Advisory, Alpine Associates, KPS Life, ChristianaCare, Luna Diabetes). No stories tagged W24 (current ISO week). Full row data extracted: Story Title, Announcement Summary, What It Means, Analogy, Source, Source Link, Source Date, Capture Source, Lens, Relevance, Resonance. Results grouped by client and week, staged as notion-candidates.json. Note: the shadow_load_context call for notion:33bf7118-384a-8256-a86c-01c08c40b991 returned an error about missing method — worked around it by querying the database directly via notion_exec.
actions: shadow_load_context: notion:33bf7118-384a-8256-a86c-01c08c40b991 (attempted, errored — fell back to direct notion_exec)
wrote notion-candidates.json with 22 stories grouped by 7 clients
